questions.question: A football team wins $72%$ of their games. If they play $25$ games, how many games do they win?
A basketball player makes $3$ out of every $5$ free throws. What is the ratio of free throws made to total free throws attempted?
A cyclist travels $18$ miles in $2$ hours. What is the cyclist's rate in miles per hour?
A tennis player wins $80%$ of her serves. If she serves $20$ times, how many serves does she win?
A runner runs $12$ miles in $4$ hours. What is the runner's rate in miles per hour?
A volleyball team has a $4:1$ ratio of wins to losses. If they have $5$ losses, how many wins do they have?
A swimmer swims $15$ laps in $30$ minutes. What is the swimmer's rate in laps per minute?
A golfer has a $2:3$ ratio of birdies to bogies. If the golfer has $9$ bogies, how many birdies does the golfer have?
A baseball team has a $3:2$ ratio of wins to losses. If they have $10$ games played, how many wins and losses does the team have? Show your work and explain your answer.

A soccer player kicks the ball with a speed of $25$ miles per hour. If the ball travels $120$ yards in $4$ seconds, what is the player's accuracy in terms of the ratio of distance traveled to intended distance? Show your work and explain your answer.

teacher_rules: Read each question carefully before answering.
Use a pencil to fill in the answer circles.
Check your work before submitting your test.
